summary: Fans express strong affection for the show, but reviews give no details on performance or audio quality, leaving the recording source and sound quality uncertain.
review: One reviewer gives the recording a perfect five‑star rating, praising their love of the Dead, while another offers a modest three stars, recalling only the atmosphere and a Chuck Berry appearance. No specific comments about song execution, band members, or audio fidelity are provided, so both show and recording quality remain undefined.

ai_rating.rationale: Average of the two star ratings (5 + 3) ÷ 2 = 4, adjusted slightly downward due to lack of concrete information about performance and sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned any audio characteristics; therefore the recording quality cannot be assessed beyond a neutral assumption.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided about set structure or pacing.
